title: Dynamic Luxury Commercial Poster With Surreal 3D Render
sourceTitle: Image To Image Luxury Social Phone Burst Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image dynamic luxury commercial poster using uploaded adult female face reference before surreal orange-gold social media ad transformation, transforming same adult woman from the uploaded face reference into a surreal 3D social-media campaign heroine. Subject: same adult woman from the uploaded face reference preserves the uploaded face reference while wearing premium bright orange designer outfit with luxury accessories and stylish gold sunglasses, bursting confidently from a giant metallic gold smartphone screen with a powerful fashion pose. Scene: Clean white premium advertising background with bold editorial typography for X / Twitter luxury creator campaign, floating glossy social media icons, gold geometric elements, elegant UI graphics, luxury brand graphics, and QR area SCAN TO JOIN. Composition: Fixed 3:4 vertical commercial poster with forced-perspective white luxury sneaker in the foreground, wide-angle cinematic distortion, shallow depth of field, heroine emerging through the smartphone display, and surrounding 3D interaction icons. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image luxury social phone burst poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Surreal 3D luxury commercial art direction, high-end influencer marketing aesthetic, modern social-media branding, glossy reflections, 8K commercial detail, cinematic shadows, and premium digital advertising finish. Color Palette: Fixed dominant bright orange, clean white, metallic gold, matte fabric contrast, glossy phone reflections, and refined luxury highlight accents. Lighting: Bright studio promotional lighting with rich reflections on metallic gold phone edges, crisp sneaker highlights, dimensional icon shadows, and cinematic depth. Typography: BREAK THROUGH THE FEED appears as the bold editorial headline; X / Twitter luxury creator campaign appears as premium software or social campaign branding; SCAN TO JOIN labels the stylish QR zone. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

promptTranslations.en: A dynamic, luxury commercial advertisement poster featuring a vibrant young woman rendered in surreal 3D—using the uploaded female face as reference—dressed in high-end, bright orange designer apparel, opulent accessories, and stylish gold-tinted sunglasses. She bursts confidently from a massive golden smartphone screen. Her pose is powerful and fashion-forward, with one athletic sneaker dramatically piercing through the digital display into reality via strong forced perspective. The composition foregrounds her white luxury sneakers with textured gum-sole detailing, enhanced by cinematic wide-angle lens distortion and shallow depth of field. Shimmering 3D social media icons, golden geometric elements, and premium brand graphics float around her, evoking high-end influencer marketing aesthetics. Bright studio lighting creates an energetic, premium promotional atmosphere; rich metallic reflections along the golden phone’s edge contrast beautifully with matte fabric textures. A dominant palette of orange, white, and gold conveys a hyper-modern, luxury X/Twitter ad vibe. Clean white background with bold editorial typography, premium software-brand elements, elegant UI graphics, floating interactive icons, and a stylish QR code zone. Surreal 8K quality, cinematic shadows, refined commercial art direction, luxurious feminine energy, fashion-forward marketing aesthetics, contemporary social media branding, glossy reflections, and high-end digital advertising style. Aspect ratio: 3:4. product: architectural perfume bottle. fictional brand: Vellum Atelier. campaign mood: minimal high-fashion campaign mood. color palette: pearl white, graphite, mist blue, and silver controls the palette, accents, background, and supporting visual elements. typography: visible headline: "THE NEW SIGNAL".
